queries.question: Give me the performance types for each cultural center.
queries.sql: SELECT Performances.type  from Cultural_Centers_Performances join Performances on Cultural_Centers_Performances.performanceID = Performances.performanceID join Cultural_Centers on Cultural_Centers_Performances.culturalCenterID = Cultural_Centers.centerID   GROUP BY Cultural_Centers_Performances.performanceID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Cultural_Centers_Performances.culturalCenterID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Cultural_Centers)

queries.question: Give me the performance types for each cultural center.
queries.sql: select cultural_centers.name , performances.type from Cultural_Centers_Performances join Performances on Cultural_Centers_Performances.performanceID = Performances.performanceID join Cultural_Centers on Cultural_Centers_Performances.culturalCenterID = Cultural_Centers.centerID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?cultural_centers_performances a :Cultural_Centers_Performances .
  ?performances a :Performances .
  ?cultural_centers_performances p:hasPerformances ?performances .
  ?cultural_centers a :Cultural_Centers .
  ?cultural_centers_performances p:hasCultural_Centers ?cultural_centers .
  ?cultural_centers p:name ?name .
  ?performances p:type ?type .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Give me the performance types for each cultural center.
